review_gates.notes: Splitting the quick-experiment profile into a standalone repo; generic-agent adapter is the portable surface.

quick-experiment kernel, profile-index entry, and its 9 member skills are copied as authoritative sources. The depends_on chain (core-ops + automation) is documented on the profile-index entry and remains explicit in the destination repo.
Direct-entrypoint selection semantics carried over; the profile escalates to ml-research for paper-bound work rather than overriding it.
Source inventory, file copy list, and exclusion list reviewed before scaffolding the destination repo. depends_on chain noted; lifecycle boundary between scratchpad and paper-bound work documented.
Pre-split: acceptance_checks in source repo. Post-split: re-run exporter, validator, inventory script, and confirm quick-experiment references no paper-writing skill in the destination repo.

Privacy audit at schemas/skill-kernel/repo-split/quick-experiment-privacy-audit-2026-05-28.json reports status: passed with zero hits over the proposed split set, including credential / job-log / scheduler-API-token patterns.
Inventory + audit confirm no credential, auth token, raw job log, or concrete cluster path appears in any file the scaffolder would copy.

privacy_audit.notes: Programmatic audit at schemas/skill-kernel/repo-split/quick-experiment-privacy-audit-2026-05-28.json scans every included file for credential / personal-identifier / concrete sidecar / SSH-key patterns and reports 0 hits over 62 checked paths.

rollback.restore_strategy: Record destination repo URL, commit hash before scaffolding, and exact file copy list; on rollback, delete the destination repo (or revert its first commit) and restore the source profile-index entry from the rollback record.
